query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`products`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,max(`testdb`.`products`.`price`) AS `max_price`,min(`testdb`.`products`.`price`) AS `min_price` from `testdb`.`products` group by `testdb`.`products`.`category_id`
operation: Covering index skip scan for grouping on products using idx_cat_price
